title: Explosion Wands
description: A fun mod that adds a variety of explosion wands to the game. Use at your own discretion!
body:
![Two of the explosion wands!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c1e165302c518472cc38c66304d1809a44f8151.png)

# Explosion Wands
A fun mod that adds **13** wands in total, which are all designed for *explosive fun!*

(Showcase video at the bottom)

# The Wands

**Fireball Wand**

**Fireball Shotgun Wand**

**Fireball Hitscan Wand**

**Fireball Barrage Wand**

**Fireball Scatter Wand**


**TNT Instant Barrage Wand**

**TNT Slow Barrage Wand**

**TNT Tornado Wand**

**TNT Drill Wand**

**TNT Chicken Wand**

**TNT Exploding Blocks Wand**

**TNT Exploding Entities Wand**

**TNT Falling Wand**

# Performance Notes
I have tried my best to optimize this mod the best I can, but as is the nature with a mod like this, it will still be quite performance heavy on any machine, no matter how powerful. So, discretion is adviced!

# Misc
This is also the first mod I have ever made for Minecraft, but I thought starting out with making items that solely focused on explosions was a fun first mod to make, so I went ahead and did exactly that! This also means that the code is very inconsistent and spaghetti, given that I was actively learning during every implementation when making this mod. But you're more than free to change any values to your heart's content, with some discretion of course!

# Bug Reporting
If you encounter any bugs or you have some feedback you'd like to tell me, then feel free to do it through the GitHub page for reporting issues. They are very much appreciated, and I'll see what I can do with them!

# Last notes
With that, hope you enjoy this mod as much as I had making it :D
